Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Chicago
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago and Pulaski due to street blockage near Pulaski/Chicago.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago, then resume their normal route on Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Pulaski/Chicago.
